index.title: Chinese In Flow — Learn Chinese Characters | HSK Practice Game
index.description: Practice simplified Chinese characters with a fast click-and-match game organized by HSK level. Study 汉字, pinyin, English, or audio — free in your browser.

about.title: About Chinese In Flow — How the Game Helps You Learn
about.description: Learn how Chinese In Flow uses fast recognition practice, repetition, and HSK vocabulary sets to help you study simplified Chinese characters.

contact.title: Contact — Chinese In Flow
contact.description: Contact Owen Dwyer, creator of Chinese In Flow, with feedback or questions about learning Chinese characters.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Chinese In Flow
privacy.description: Privacy policy for the Chinese In Flow website and Android app: local progress storage, anonymous usage statistics, and no ads or accounts.

hsk1.title: HSK 1 Chinese Characters — Chinese In Flow
hsk1.description: HSK 1 vocabulary guide: 150 beginner Chinese characters with sample words, pinyin, and English meanings. Practice them in the game.

hsk2.title: HSK 2 Chinese Characters — Chinese In Flow
hsk2.description: HSK 2 vocabulary overview: 300 Chinese characters for elementary learners, with sample words, pinyin, and English meanings.

hsk3.title: HSK 3 Chinese Characters — Chinese In Flow
hsk3.description: HSK 3 vocabulary: 600 Chinese characters for intermediate beginners, with sample words, pinyin, and English translations.

hsk4.title: HSK 4 Chinese Characters — Chinese In Flow
hsk4.description: HSK 4 vocabulary reference: 1,200 Chinese characters for intermediate learners, with sample words and pinyin.

hsk5.title: HSK 5 Chinese Characters — Chinese In Flow
hsk5.description: HSK 5 advanced vocabulary: 2,500 Chinese characters with sample words, pinyin, and English meanings.

dictionary-app.title: Hanping Chinese Dictionary — Chinese In Flow
dictionary-app.description: Recommended offline Chinese dictionary app for Mandarin and Cantonese learners, with links to Hanping Chinese Dictionary.

app-version.title: Android App — Chinese In Flow
app-version.description: Download the Chinese In Flow Android app from Google Play — the same HSK character sets as the free web game.
